executives.name: Alex Heath
executives.background: Mr. Heath has over 15 years of experience in the financial services and mining industries. He previously served as President and CEO of Ethos Gold Corp. (now Prospector Metals). He has also worked in investment banking with a focus on the mining sector.

tenure_dates.title: President & CEO (Nov 2021 – Sept 2023); CFO & Director (Sept 2023 – Present)

executives.name: Danielle MacDonald
executives.background: Ms. MacDonald is a CPA, CA with over 15 years of experience in financial reporting and corporate compliance for public companies in the mining industry.

executives.name: Jo Price
executives.background: Ms. Price is a Professional Geoscientist with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles in exploration and corporate development.

executives.name: Rob Carpenter
executives.background: Dr. Carpenter is a professional geologist with over 30 years of experience. He was the co-founder and President/CEO of Kaminak Gold Corp., which was acquired by Goldcorp for $520 million.

board_of_directors.name: Alex Heath
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Heath has over 15 years of experience in the financial services and mining industries. He previously served as President and CEO of Ethos Gold Corp. (now Prospector Metals). He has also worked in investment banking with a focus on the mining sector.
